prose.en: Assessors MUST obtain and maintain accreditation through the American Association for Laboratory Accreditation (A2LA) Cybersecurity Inspection Body Program to qualify for FedRAMP Recognition.

https://ns.fedramp.gov/cr26/facet/narrat.note: FedRAMP will remove FedRAMP Recognition immediately after the American Association for Laboratory Accreditation notifies FedRAMP that an assessor's accreditation has lapsed.
